DESCRIPTION: Unique identifier for each customer record. Auto-generated primary key.
External system identifier for customer synchronization (e.g. from CRM or ERP system).
Full legal or business name of the customer organization.
Unique customer identification number in the enterprise system. Used in unique constraint with emlaType.
Type/category of EMLA engagement (e.g. "RISE with SAP", "GROW with SAP"). Part of unique constraint with customerNumber.
Geographic region for the customer (e.g. "EMEA", "Americas", "APJ").
Country code or name where the customer is located.
Engagement start date or contract effective date.
Name of the ERP Onboarding Advisor assigned to this customer.
Name of the BTP (Business Technology Platform) Onboarding Advisor.
Email address of the BTP Onboarding Advisor. Used for value help and notifications.
Overall engagement status (e.g. "In Progress", "Completed", "On Hold", "Cancelled").
Session ID/reference for the primary TrackApp onboarding session (typically UUID format).
Session ID/reference for the TrackApp TP2 (Technical Platform 2) session.
Session ID/reference for the TrackApp Success Hub (SH) session.
Comma-separated list of product codes included in the EMLA agreement.
Primary product name associated with this engagement.
Stock Keeping Unit identifier for the main product.
Flag indicating whether BTP onboarding sessions are mandatory for this customer.
Current status of the primary TrackApp session (e.g. "Scheduled", "In Progress", "Completed", "Rejected").
Current status of the TP2 session.
Current status of the Success Hub session.
Date when the primary TrackApp session was/is scheduled.
Date when the TP2 session was/is scheduled.
Date when the Success Hub session was/is scheduled.
Indicates whether the primary TrackApp session has been successfully completed.
Completion flag for TP2 session.
Completion flag for Success Hub session.
Indicates whether the primary TrackApp session was rejected or cancelled.
Rejection flag for TP2 session.
Rejection flag for Success Hub session.
Date when the entire onboarding process was completed. Set when status changes to "Completed".
Free-text field for additional notes, comments, or special instructions related to the customer engagement.
Timestamp when the record was created (inherited from managed aspect).
User ID of the person who created the record (inherited from managed aspect).
Timestamp of the last modification (inherited from managed aspect).
User ID of the person who last modified the record (inherited from managed aspect).
Unique identifier or username for the onboarding advisor. Primary key.
Full name of the onboarding advisor.
Email address for the advisor. Used for notifications and contact.
Unique identifier for each progress record.
User ID of the BTP onboarding advisor responsible for this engagement task.
High-level status code for the engagement task.
Human-readable detailed status description providing more context.
Name/description of the specific engagement task or milestone being tracked.
Reference to the customer (may link to EMLACustomers.externalID or customerNumber).
Date associated with this progress entry (e.g. task completion date, status change date). Note: Column name is quoted in HANA as "DATE" because it's a reserved keyword.
